---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in build, deployment, or infrastructure validation behavior
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the defect clearly.

## Affected area

- Build or packaging
- Deployment or rollout
- Cluster or environment config
- CI validation or docs

## Current behavior

What is happening now?

## Expected behavior

What should happen instead?

## Reproduction or evidence

Provide workflow runs, logs, rendered manifests, rollout output, or screenshots.

## Impact

- [ ] Breaks staging delivery
- [ ] Breaks production operations
- [ ] Breaks packaging or image publication
- [ ] Affects multiple repositories or environments

## Notes

Add affected services, environments, or operational follow-up here.
